description_long: This rifle features a compact, robust design with a dark metallic receiver and barrel assembly, complemented by a wooden fixed stock and foregrip. The receiver is boxy and industrial, with visible screws and a prominent magazine well, suggesting a detachable box magazine. The barrel is relatively short and thick, with a perforated heat shield and a simple iron sight mounted on top. The wooden stock and foregrip have a dark, polished finish, contrasting with the matte black metal components. A small, cylindrical muzzle device is attached to the end of the barrel, likely serving as a flash hider. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on function over form.
description: A compact rifle with a dark metal body, short barrel, and polished wooden stock and foregrip. It features a detachable box magazine, iron sights, and a flash hider.
description_view_0: The left side view shows the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, metal receiver, and the perforated barrel shroud.
description_view_1: The top-down view emphasizes the alignment of the barrel, iron sights, and the slim profile of the wooden stock.
description_view_2: The right side view displays the magazine well, trigger guard, and the attachment of the wooden stock to the metal receiver.
description_view_3: The front view focuses on the muzzle device, barrel opening, and the symmetry of the iron sights.
